creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
See also: bug 280145

(In reply to Francis Little from comment #3)

ykla, maybe change (broaden) the summary line of your report? 

In my case – two different computers, one of which does not use Intel hardware for Wi-Fi, <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/1258889867081941093/1258889867081941093> in FreeBSD Discord: 

>> Select an unmarked ([ ]) entry to join that network. 
> 
> Nothing happens.
